history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with dark, slightly windswept hair is captured in a motion blur, walking through a dimly lit, multi-story concrete parking garage. He is wearing a dark grey oversized hoodie and black shorts. His right hand is raised to his face, partially obscuring it, and his left arm is extended slightly to his side, also blurred due to movement. The background reveals rows of parked cars, concrete pillars, and overhead lighting fixtures with exposed conduits. In the distance, several other people are walking, also appearing somewhat blurred. The floor of the garage is a wet, reflective concrete surface, showing streaks and puddles that catch the artificial light. The overall lighting is subdued and industrial, casting long shadows and creating a somewhat moody, urban atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by greys, blacks, and the muted tones of concrete and car bodies, with occasional hints of red from pipes or signage. The style is candid and slightly voyeuristic, emphasizing the sense of movement and the everyday environment of a parking structure.
